eval_dimensions.name: Mode Selection Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Presents Same Session vs External+New Session via AskUserQuestion; does NOT auto-select a mode without user input

eval_dimensions.name: Branch Naming
eval_dimensions.description: Derives branch name following username/TICKET-ID/slug convention; detects existing username from git branch -a

eval_dimensions.name: Path A — EnterWorktree
eval_dimensions.description: Calls EnterWorktree tool (not a shell command) for same-session mode; session CWD switches correctly

eval_dimensions.name: Path B — External Worktree
eval_dimensions.description: Creates worktree via script, installs SessionEnd cleanup hook, then STOPS — does not continue ticket workflow

eval_dimensions.name: post-checkout Hook Setup
eval_dimensions.description: Reads existing post-checkout hook; proposes template only when missing or incomplete; requires user approval before writing

evals.name: same-session-enter-worktree
evals.description: User chooses Same Session mode for ticket GH-42. Skill must call EnterWorktree and resume workflow inside the new worktree.

assertions.text: Calls AskUserQuestion with Same Session and External+New Session options
Derived branch name contains GH-42 ticket segment
Uses EnterWorktree tool call (not git worktree add via Bash)
Does NOT print the 'close this session' hand-off message for Path A

evals.name: external-worktree-hands-off
evals.description: User chooses External+New Session mode. Skill must create the worktree, install SessionEnd hook, print the hand-off message, and STOP.

assertions.text: Asks user to confirm the calculated worktree path before creating it
Prints the hand-off message instructing user to close session and open new one
Does NOT continue with ticket workflow steps after Path B hand-off
Runs setup-session-end-hook.sh so the new session prompts cleanup on exit

evals.name: post-checkout-hook-missing
evals.description: Python/uv project has no post-checkout hook. Skill must detect project type, propose Template A, and require approval before writing.

assertions.text: Attempts to read .git/hooks/post-checkout or .husky/post-checkout before proposing template
Proposes Template A (Python/uv) based on uv.lock or pyproject.toml detection
Does NOT write the hook file without user approval

evals.name: branch-naming-from-git-log
evals.description: Skill detects the current user's username from existing branch patterns in git branch -a and constructs a properly formatted branch name.

assertions.text: Runs git branch -a to detect existing username pattern
Proposed branch name contains the ticket ID GH-100

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the git-worktree skill

should_trigger.query: create a worktree for GH-42 so I can work in isolation
I need a new isolated workspace for this feature branch
should_trigger.rationale: Workspace isolation is the core use case

should_trigger.query: start working on GH-200 in a separate worktree
should_trigger.rationale: Feature work needing isolation — canonical trigger

should_not_trigger.rationale: Read-only query — use git worktree list directly
Cleanup action — use git worktree remove directly

should_not_trigger.query: I'm already in a worktree, let's commit these changes
